name: manage_task
description: Create, update, list, complete, or cancel user tasks. Tasks have a title, optional due date, priority, and status lifecycle (open → in_progress → done). Use this when the user asks to track, manage, or follow up on an action item. For simple time-based reminders use schedule_reminder instead.

action.description: Operation to perform: 'create' a new task, 'update' fields on an existing task, 'complete' a task (sets status=done), 'cancel' a task, 'list' open tasks, 'add_update' appends a progress note to a task.

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

task_id.description: UUID of the task to operate on. Required for 'update', 'complete', 'cancel', 'add_update'.

description.description: Optional longer description of the task.

due_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the task is due. Null for no deadline.

filter_status.description: For 'list': filter by status. 'active' = open + in_progress + blocked (default).

task.description: Full task record after the operation (create/update/complete/cancel).
